headline: PROVE WHO SUPPLIES YOUR QUALITY
subheading: Build a risk-tiered, audit-ready supplier register that satisfies EU GMP, GDP and the MHRA.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial concept of a controlled pharmaceutical supplier register: a precise grid of softly glowing approval cells linked by clean traceability lines flowing into a central qualified hub, surrounded by translucent floating panels suggesting audit certificates, risk tiers and validity status checkmarks, layered over a quietly lit modern cleanroom-warehouse depth with neatly arranged blank material containers receding into bokeh, deep navy background dissolving into teal and cyan light, a single subtle fresh-green status indicator glowing to signal approval, shallow depth of field, calm authoritative clinical-luxury atmosphere, premium glassy materials and soft volumetric side lighting, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
